snippets.text: To support natural gas channeling to Tambak Lorok, it will be done under the sale and purchase agreement between PGN and PLN.
State-owned gas company PT Perusahaan Gas Negara (PGN), through its subsidiary Saka Energy Muriah Ltd, is ready to channel gas from its Kepodang gas field.
PGN signed one gas sales agreement with state oil company subsidiary PT Pertamina Hulu Energi Jambi Merang.
PGN also signed five letters of agreement (LOA) with ConocoPhillips Grissik Limited (CPGL) to lower gas prices for 417.2 BBUTD worth of gas, as mandated by the government.
It also signed two similar LOAs with Medco Energi for gas worth 24.67 BBUTD.
PetroChina International Jabung Ltd. (PCJL) has signed a gas sales purchase agreement (GSPA) with Indonesian state-owned gas distribution firm PT Perusahaan Gas Negara (PGN).
PCJL will supply 4,651 billion British thermal units (BBTU) to PGN, in effect from January 1 this year to December 31, 2026.
PT Perusahaan Gas Negara (PGN) Tbk (PGAS) signed a liquefied natural gas (LNG) gas sale and purchase agreement (PJBG) with PT Donggi-Senoro LNG (DSLNG).
On August 8, 2024, the Company and DSLNG have signed an LNG purchase umbrella contract through MSPA, and signed a September CM for the plan to purchase one LNG cargo in September 2024.
NuEnergy Gas Limited has signed a binding Gas Sales and Purchase Agreement with PT Perusahaan Gas Negara Tbk for the sale of coal bed methane from its Tanjung Enim Plan of Development.
PT Krakatau Steel (Persero) Tbk yang beberapa waktu lalu telah menandatangani Perjanjian Jual Beli Gas dengan PGN.

PT Perusahaan Gas Negara Tbk (PGN) dan PT Krakatau Steel (Persero) Tbk melalui anak usahanya, PT Krakatau Bandar Samudera (KBS) sepakat mengembangkan pasar dan infrastruktur gas bumi di kawasan pelabuhan.
